languages.text: {n}Вы замечаете, что то один, то другой гвардеец морщится, словно от головной боли, или подергивается. Эти люди похожи на безумцев, готовых в любую секунду то ли перейти к драке, то ли пуститься в восторженный пляс.{/n}
{n}You notice some among the Guardsmen cringing in pain, as if from a headache, or twitching. These people look deranged, ready to snap into violence or dance in delirious joy at any moment.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы замечаете, что то один, то другой гвардеец морщится, словно от головной боли, или подергивается. Эти люди похожи на безумцев, готовых в любую секунду то ли перейти к драке, то ли пуститься в восторженный пляс.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You notice one or the other of the Guardsmen cringing in pain, as if from a headache, or twitching. These people look deranged, ready to snap into violence or dance in delirious joy at any moment.{/n}
{n}You notice some among the Guardsmen cringing in pain, as if from a headache, or twitching. These people look deranged, ready to snap into violence or dance in delirious joy at any moment.{/n}

{n}You notice one or the other of the Guardsmen cringing in pain, as if from a headache, or twitching. These people look deranged, ready to descend into uncontrolled violence or dance in delirious joy at any moment.{/n}

{n}You notice one of the Guardsmen cringing in pain, as if from a headache, then another starts twitching. These people look deranged, ready to descend into uncontrolled violence or dance in delirious joy at any moment.{/n}

languages.text: {n}警備隊員の一人が、頭痛のように苦しんだり、痙攣したりしているのが見える。彼らは狂気に満ちていて、いつ暴力を振るったり、狂喜乱舞したりするかわからない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You notice one or the other of the Guardsmen cringing in pain, as if from a headache, or twitching. These people look deranged, ready to descend into uncontrolled violence or dance in delirious joy at any moment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}警備隊員の一人が、頭痛のように苦しんだり、痙攣したりしているのが見える。彼らは狂気に満ちていて、いつ暴力を振るったり、狂喜乱舞したりするかわからない。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du bemerkst, dass sich einige der Gardisten krümmen, als hätten sie Kopfschmerzen. Diese Menschen wirken derangiert, bereit, jeden Moment in Gewalt auszubrechen oder einen wahnhaften Freudentanz aufzuführen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You notice some among the Guardsmen cringing in pain, as if from a headache, or twitching. These people look deranged, ready to snap into violence or dance in delirious joy at any moment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du bemerkst, dass sich einige der Gardisten krümmen, als hätten sie Kopfschmerzen. Diese Menschen wirken derangiert, bereit, jeden Moment in Gewalt auszubrechen oder einen wahnhaften Freudentanz aufzuführen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous remarquez des grimaces dolentes sur le visage de certains gardes, comme s'ils souffraient d'une migraine, ainsi que des tics convulsifs. Ces gens ont l'air dérangés, prêts à basculer dans la violence ou dans la liesse à tout instant.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You notice some among the Guardsmen cringing in pain, as if from a headache, or twitching. These people look deranged, ready to snap into violence or dance in delirious joy at any moment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous remarquez des grimaces dolentes sur le visage de certains gardes, comme s'ils souffraient d'une migraine, ainsi que des tics convulsifs. Ces gens ont l'air dérangés, prêts à basculer dans la violence ou dans la liesse à tout instant.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Notas que algunos de los guardias se retuercen, como si tuvieran dolor de cabeza, o convulsionan. Esta gente parece desquiciada, a punto de luchar o bailar alegremente en cualquier momento.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You notice some among the Guardsmen cringing in pain, as if from a headache, or twitching. These people look deranged, ready to snap into violence or dance in delirious joy at any moment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Notas que algunos de los guardias se retuercen, como si tuvieran dolor de cabeza, o convulsionan. Esta gente parece desquiciada, a punto de luchar o bailar alegremente en cualquier momento.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Muhafızlardan bazılarının, sanki baş ağrısı çekiyormuş gibi acı içinde kıvrandığını veya seğirdiğini fark ediyorsun. Bu insanlar aklını yitirmiş gibi görünüyor, her an şiddete başvurmaya ya da çılgınca bir neşeyle dans etmeye hazırlar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You notice some among the Guardsmen cringing in pain, as if from a headache, or twitching. These people look deranged, ready to snap into violence or dance in delirious joy at any moment.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Muhafızlardan bazılarının, sanki baş ağrısı çekiyormuş gibi acı içinde kıvrandığını veya seğirdiğini fark ediyorsun. Bu insanlar aklını yitirmiş gibi görünüyor, her an şiddete başvurmaya ya da çılgınca bir neşeyle dans etmeye hazırlar.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你注意到一些卫兵痛苦地缩着身子，仿佛头痛欲裂，或是浑身抽搐。这些人看起来精神错乱，似乎随时都可能暴起伤人，或是在狂喜中手舞足蹈。{/n}
